title: HITL Interruption Flow
interaction_flow_fresh_run: Runner → RunLoop: invoke run loop (non-streaming) or start_streaming() for streaming
ToolExecution → TurnResolution: if needs approval → create ToolApprovalItem(raw_item, tool_name, tool_namespace, tool_origin)
ToolPlanning → TurnResolution: returns list[ToolApprovalItem] (also includes nested agent-as-tool interruptions)
RunLoop → AgentRunnerHelpers: update_run_state_for_interruption(run_state, model_responses, processed_response, generated_items, session_items, current_turn, next_step)
RunLoop → AgentRunnerHelpers: build_interruption_result(result_input, session_items, model_responses, current_agent, interruptions=approvals_from_step(next_step), processed_response, ...)
RunLoop → Caller: return RunResult with interruptions populated
interaction_flow_streaming: RunLoop → _finalize_streamed_interruption(streamed_result, save_items, items, response_id, store_setting, interruptions=approvals_from_step(next_step), processed_response)
Caller: drain stream_events() until complete, inspect RunResultStreaming.interruptions
interaction_flow_resumed_run: Caller → RunState: state.approve(interruption, always_approve=False) or state.reject(interruption, rejection_message=...)
Caller → Runner: Runner.run(agent, state) or Runner.run_streamed(agent, state)
RunLoop: validate run_state._model_responses and _last_processed_response exist (raises UserError if missing)

RunLoop → TurnResolution: resolve_interrupted_turn(bindings, original_input=run_state._original_input, original_pre_step_items=run_state._generated_items, new_response=last_model_response, processed_response=run_state._last_processed_response, run_state=run_state)
resolve_interrupted_turn → _function_requires_approval(run): check if call_id in approval_items_by_call_id
resolve_interrupted_turn: if rejected → _record_function_rejection() → resolve_approval_rejection_message() → append rejection ToolCallOutputItem
resolve_interrupted_turn: if approved → execute tool normally
resolve_interrupted_turn → RunLoop: return SingleStepResult (NextStepFinalOutput | NextStepRunAgain | NextStepInterruption)
RunLoop: if NextStepInterruption again → update_run_state_for_interruption + build_interruption_result → return to Caller
RunLoop: if NextStepFinalOutput → complete the run normally
RunLoop: if NextStepRunAgain → continue the loop

NextStepInterruption.note: Returned by TurnResolution when any tool calls need approval

RunResult_interrupted.note: Caller inspects .interruptions to identify pending approvals

build_interruption_result.signature: build_interruption_result(*, result_input, session_items, model_responses, current_agent, input_guardrail_results, tool_input_guardrail_results, tool_output_guardrail_results, context_wrapper, interruptions, processed_response, tool_use_tracker, max_turns, current_turn, generated_items, run_state, original_input) -> RunResult
build_interruption_result.note: Constructs RunResult with final_output=None and interruptions list; sets _current_turn, _model_input_items, _trace_state

update_run_state_for_interruption.signature: update_run_state_for_interruption(*, run_state, model_responses, processed_response, generated_items, session_items, current_turn, next_step: NextStepInterruption) -> None
update_run_state_for_interruption.note: Syncs all RunState fields needed to resume after interruption

resolve_interrupted_turn.signature: async resolve_interrupted_turn(*, bindings, original_input, original_pre_step_items, new_response, processed_response, hooks, context_wrapper, run_config, server_manages_conversation, run_state) -> SingleStepResult
resolve_interrupted_turn.note: Re-enters tool execution for a previously-interrupted turn; reads approvals/rejections from RunState

_finalize_streamed_interruption.signature: async _finalize_streamed_interruption(*, streamed_result, save_items, items, response_id, store_setting, interruptions, processed_response) -> None
_finalize_streamed_interruption.note: Persists items, then calls _complete_stream_interruption to mark stream as done

_complete_stream_interruption.note: Sets interruptions, is_complete=True, puts QueueCompleteSentinel to end the stream

function_needs_approval.note: Evaluates needs_approval: True|False|async callable. Callable receives (ctx, parsed_args, call_id)

_collect_tool_interruptions.note: Collects ToolApprovalItems from function_results, custom_tool_results, shell_results, apply_patch_results; also surfaces nested agent-as-tool interruptions

approval_sources: Hosted MCP via McpApprovalRequest (require_approval=always on HostedMCPTool)
Local MCP via require_approval on MCPServerStdio/MCPServerSse
Agent.as_tool() with needs_approval — surfaces on outer run
important_notes: Interruptions surface on the outer run regardless of nesting depth (handoffs, Agent.as_tool())
RunState._current_step=NextStepInterruption is the signal that the run is paused
Not all interruptions need to be resolved in one pass; partial resolution re-enters the interruption loop
always_approve=True / always_reject=True persist decisions across calls to the same tool for the rest of the run
Sticky decisions survive state.to_json() / RunState.from_json() serialization
RunConfig.tool_error_formatter controls default rejection message; state.reject(interruption, rejection_message=...) overrides per-call
For streaming: caller must drain stream_events() before inspecting .interruptions
Session items are saved (excluding approval placeholders) before the interruption is surfaced
